not financial advise but i need 3 strong contenders for this that complements my portfolio - Here's my honest read: exiting the Tier 3 names is the right call for CAGR optimization. But redeploying 100% of that capital back into the same AI/semi/crypto narrative makes concentration worse without improving resilience. You already have the growth engines. What you're missing is one or two uncorrelated compounders that still clear your 25.3% hurdle — or at minimum don't collapse when semis do.
